sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65137" key="masteute/on" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μαστ-ευτέον</orth>, <sense id="n65137.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one must inquire</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Max.</author> </bibl> Tyr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1487.tlg001:34:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">34.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
